title: Optimized for PVP
description: A modpack that aims to create a good pvp experience.
body:
## You dont have to use some clients for pvp...
if you can use this modpack!
Offering a variety of features such as an fps boost, reduced to no hurtcam, a less cluttered f3 menu and much more, whilst staying simple and easy to use.
Feel free to take the time to customize all the settings to fit yor wishes to gain the ultimate Minecraft pvp experience.
